meta.label: FreestyleFly 结构化词库 · 其他

entries.title: Architecture & Space
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Interior, exterior, city, map, and spatial concept visuals.

Define viewpoint, scale, material, lighting, and spatial function.
For maps, specify landmarks, labels, border decoration, and visual accuracy level.
Avoid impossible perspectives unless the output is conceptual.
Lock map label language and relative placement.
entries.description: Interior, exterior, city, map, and spatial concept visuals.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成室内、建筑、城市地图和空间概念视觉。
entries.promptZh:
生成室内、建筑、城市地图和空间概念视觉。

定义视角、尺度、材质、光线和空间功能。
地图需要指定地标、标签、边框装饰和准确度。
概念图之外要避免不合理透视。
锁定地图标签语言和相对位置。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《建筑与空间》。 关键词：Architecture、Interior、Travel、Commerce。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: architecture & space interior, exterior, city, map, and spatial concept visuals. interior, exterior, city, map, and spatial concept visuals. define viewpoint, scale, material, lighting, and spatial function. for maps, specify landmarks, labels, border decoration, and visual accuracy level. avoid impossible perspectives unless the output is conceptual. lock map label language and relative placement. architecture & spaces architecture interior map travel commerce

entries.title: Illustration & Art Style
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Anime, watercolor, ink, material experiments, and art direction.

Define composition, subject, palette, brush material, mood, and rendering depth.
For reference images, state what must be preserved.
Avoid style-only prompts without composition.
Lock character identity when using references.
entries.description: Anime, watercolor, ink, material experiments, and art direction.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成动漫、水彩、水墨、材质实验和艺术风格图。
entries.promptZh:
生成动漫、水彩、水墨、材质实验和艺术风格图。

定义构图、主体、配色、笔触材质、情绪和完成度。
参考图任务需要说明保留哪些特征。
避免只写风格,不写构图。
使用参考图时锁定角色识别。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《插画与艺术风格》。 关键词：Illustration、Art、Story、Creative。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: illustration & art style anime, watercolor, ink, material experiments, and art direction. anime, watercolor, ink, material experiments, and art direction. define composition, subject, palette, brush material, mood, and rendering depth. for reference images, state what must be preserved. avoid style-only prompts without composition. lock character identity when using references. illustration & art illustration art style story creative

entries.title: History & Classical Themes
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Dynasty clothing, scroll narrative, poetry, and traditional motifs.

Specify dynasty, clothing system, object references, layout format, and cultural mood.
Use scroll, album page, or poster format deliberately.
Avoid mixing dynasties when historical accuracy matters.
Constrain random modern props.
entries.description: Dynasty clothing, scroll narrative, poetry, and traditional motifs.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成朝代服饰、长卷叙事、诗词和传统题材。
entries.promptZh:
生成朝代服饰、长卷叙事、诗词和传统题材。

指定朝代、服饰制度、器物参考、版式和文化气质。
明确长卷、册页或海报形式。
需要历史准确时,避免朝代混搭。
约束随机现代物件。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《历史与古风题材》。 关键词：History、Classical、History、Story。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: history & classical themes dynasty clothing, scroll narrative, poetry, and traditional motifs. dynasty clothing, scroll narrative, poetry, and traditional motifs. specify dynasty, clothing system, object references, layout format, and cultural mood. use scroll, album page, or poster format deliberately. avoid mixing dynasties when historical accuracy matters. constrain random modern props. history & classical themes history classical illustration scroll history story

entries.title: Concept Product Breakdown
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
R&D boards, exploded views, mixed tasks, and special outputs.

Define the artifact type, components, labels, material logic, and final presentation format.
Use clear callouts and a controlled technical style.
Avoid unspecified mixed tasks.
Keep labels short and component relationships visible.
entries.description: R&D boards, exploded views, mixed tasks, and special outputs.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成研发板、拆解图、混合任务和特殊输出。
entries.promptZh:
生成研发板、拆解图、混合任务和特殊输出。

定义产物类型、组件、标签、材质逻辑和展示格式。
使用清晰标注和受控技术风格。
避免任务边界过泛。
标签要短,组件关系要清楚。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《概念产品研发拆解》。 关键词：Other Use Cases、Product、Creative、Tech。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
